title: More than Just the Trailer
description: Your typical "Trailer" modpack... except it's not.
body:
# **More Than Just The Trailer (MTJTT)**
More Than Just The Trailer (MTJTT) isn’t your typical modpack—it’s a fully immersive experience, designed to make Minecraft look and feel like those incredible cinematic trailers we all know and love. While most modpacks offer a basic selection of mods, MTJTT goes above and beyond, filling your game with rich content, stunning visuals, and fluid animations that push the boundaries of what you expect from Minecraft.

## What Makes It "More Than Just The Trailer"?
In MTJTT, we’ve taken inspiration from the cinematic trailers that showcase Minecraft at its most beautiful. Those trailers are often packed with smooth animations, gorgeous lighting, and fluid combat, but the vanilla game doesn’t quite live up to that look. With MTJTT, we bring those visuals and that experience into your hands by including mods and shader packs that make Minecraft look like it’s straight out of a professional trailer.

## Key Features:
Shader-Powered Cinematics: Using the power of Iris Shaders paired with Sodium for performance optimization, MTJTT delivers breathtaking lighting, shadows, and reflections that completely transform the look of your Minecraft world. Whether you're standing on a mountain at sunrise or walking through a dense forest at dusk, the world feels alive with dynamic lighting effects that give it a movie-like feel.

### Smooth Animations
With mods like Fresh Animations and Eyeless Fresh Moves, character and mob movements are more fluid and natural, similar to what you’d expect in a trailer. No more clunky animations! Everything from swinging a sword to jumping across rooftops has been given the cinematic treatment.

## More Than Just Looks: Packed with Content
MTJTT isn’t just about looking good. While the shaders and animations make it visually stunning, the real meat of the modpack comes in the form of over 150 mods that enhance every gameplay aspect. Here’s a deeper look at what’s inside:

### Massive World Overhaul
Explore new biomes from mods like Biome Makeover and Terralith that introduce lush forests, mysterious swamps, and towering cliffs. Combined with structure mods like Towns and Towers and Repurposed Structures, you’ll find new villages, dungeons, and ruins to explore, all seamlessly integrated into your Minecraft world.

### Advanced Crafting and Automation
Mods like Create and Farmer’s Delight take crafting and automation to the next level, allowing you to build intricate machines, automated farms, and multi-step crafting processes. Whether you’re an engineer at heart or just love farming, there’s a mod here for you.

### Immersive NPCs and Mobs
Encounter new creatures and NPCs with mods like Friends and Foes, which introduce custom mobs that can be both challenging and helpful. These additions bring a sense of community and adventure to your world.

### Performance and Quality of Life Improvements
While MTJTT is packed with content, it’s also optimized for performance with mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Indium ensuring smooth gameplay even with shaders and hundreds of mods running at once. Additionally, the pack is loaded with quality of life mods like Fastload and Better Third Person, making your experience as seamless and enjoyable as possible.

## Why Choose MTJTT?
MTJTT is perfect for players who want their Minecraft world to feel more cinematic, vibrant, and alive. If you’ve ever watched a Minecraft trailer and thought, “I wish my game looked like that,” this is the modpack for you. Not only will it bring that trailer-quality look to your world, but it also adds enough mods to give you endless hours of new gameplay and exploration.

Whether you're a builder looking for stunning new blocks, a redstone engineer aiming to craft complex machinery, or an adventurer seeking new biomes and dungeons, MTJTT offers a balanced, immersive experience. Built on Fabric, this modpack focuses on performance and stability, making it perfect for players with powerful setups.

_Reminder: This modpack is still in it's earliest stages, so there may be bugs. Report all bugs to spendog.squad.bugreport@gmail.com. include your hardware, OS, as much info as you can in your email._
